hero.eyebrow: By Invitation Only · Senior Leaders · Zurich, Switzerland
hero.sub: For senior leaders across Switzerland's leading organisations whose functions are being shaped by AI — whether you're driving it or navigating it. A private roundtable series built for peer learning, real conversations, and meaningful connections. No vendor pitches. No theory.

members.label: Private Members
members.headline: What you get from being inside the room.
members.pillar1body: Every seat is held by a senior professional navigating the same pressures you are. No junior attendees, no spectators. Just people worth knowing.
members.pillar2body: No vendor agenda. No slides. No small talk. A structured roundtable where leaders speak honestly about what's working, what isn't, and what's coming.
members.pillar3title: Relevant to Switzerland, Relevant to Now
members.pillar3body: AI is moving fast. This private network filters the noise — every conversation is grounded in the Swiss market, real organisations, and decisions that actually matter to your role.
members.pillar4body: The value isn't just one evening. It's the introductions, the follow-up conversations, and the private network you build over multiple roundtables.

format.label: The Format
format.event1body: Sixteen senior leaders. One room. Mark opens with structured introductions so everyone knows who's in the room and why they're there.
format.event2body: Two attendees share a real challenge, initiative, or insight from inside their organisation. No polished decks. No sales narrative. Just honest, experience-led conversation that the room can build on.
format.event3body: The table breaks into open conversation over drinks and light bites. This is where the real connections happen — introductions are made, ideas continue, and the private network grows.
format.closing: Attendance is by personal invitation only. Mark meets every prospective member personally before extending an invitation — over coffee, at an event, or through a trusted introduction.

audience.label: Who Attends
audience.headline: Senior professionals from Switzerland's leading organisations.
audience.opening: Every seat is held by a senior professional from an established Swiss organisation — across functions, united by one thing: AI is reshaping how they lead.
audience.sub: These are the people shaping AI and automation strategy at scale — Heads of AI, CTOs, VP Technology, and Innovation Directors from some of Switzerland's most recognised names.
audience.quote: "Your prospects are already in the room. Senior AI and automation leaders in Switzerland are actively evaluating new tools and partnerships — but they're not attending mass conferences. They're gathering in trusted, curated circles."

testimonials.label: From The Room
testimonials.headline: What private members say.
testimonials.t1quote: "Hearing people openly share their real challenges and ambitions — and being able to benchmark where other organisations actually stand with AI. That's rare."
testimonials.t2quote: "The entire group consists of genuine experts who share the same ideas and are eager to make a real impact. The direct connections you make here are unlike any other event."
testimonials.t3quote: "The variety of perspectives in the room, combined with the quality of the input presentations, makes this the most valuable evening I spend each quarter."

mark.label: The Founder
mark.name: Mark Ross
mark.bio: I started this private network because I kept having the same conversation: brilliant people working on RPA, automation, and AI — but doing it in silos. No real space to share what's actually working, what isn't, and where things are heading. So I built one.
mark.quote: "InnovateInDigital brings together business & technology leaders for honest, high-quality conversations — where real experience gets shared, not just polished presentations."
mark.cred2rest: — built functions & ecosystems from the ground up

membercta.label: Ready to Join?
membercta.headline: Think you belong in the room?
membercta.sub: Attendance is personal and by invitation only. If you're a senior leader whose work is being shaped by AI, Mark would like to hear from you.

sponsors.label: For Sponsors & Partners
sponsors.sub: InnovateInDigital offers a unique partnership model — direct access to senior AI and automation decision-makers in Switzerland. No cash fee. Just genuine partnership.
sponsors.perk2: 20-minute speaking platform — demo, case study, or Q&A
sponsors.perk3: Brand positioning in a premium, trust-first private network
sponsors.boxSub: Request our Sponsor Information Pack — we'll send it directly and schedule a short conversation.

apps.label: Agentic AI Applications
apps.sub: A curated suite of Agentic AI applications — practical tools designed for the professionals in the room. Structured access ensures quality and relevance.

cta.label: Ready to Join?
cta.sub: Every seat is curated. If you're a senior leader working in AI, Automation, or Agentic technology in Switzerland — we'd love to meet you.
